rationale: Wrap the goal as `assert((ensures) ==> det_equal) by { if ensures { ... } }` so z3 instantiates `maybe_ack_packet`, `send_ack`, `valid_ack`, and `option_cpacket_to_set_packet` on both r1 and r2 with the same `self_@`/`pkt@`. Case-split on the shared `should_ack_single_message(pkt@)`: in the `true` branch use `set!{r.unwrap()@}.contains(r.unwrap()@)` against `Set::empty()` to derive a contradiction when `r is None`, then chain send_ack's `src`/`dst`/`ack_seqno` pinning through the AbstractEndPoint structural view down to the inner `Seq<u8>` ids and to the `CSingleMessage::Ack` payload; the `false` branch dually uses singleton-vs-empty to force `r is None` on both sides. Broadcast Vec/Seq/Set axiom groups so the underlying length/index/ext-equal lemmas are available.
